name: jbarson-claude-skills
description: Jon Barson's personal skill marketplace — self-improving AI workflow infrastructure with learning loops, knowledge capture, and skill authoring
author: jbarson

skills.name: browse-skills
skills.description: Discover and adopt skills from the central skill ecosystem

skills.name: disk-cleanup
skills.description: Scan local disk for large storage consumers and identify cleanup opportunities

skills.name: handoff
skills.description: Generate structured context prompts for transferring work between agent sessions

skills.name: improve
skills.description: End-of-session learning loop — extract friction, improve skills, capture knowledge

skills.name: knowledge
skills.description: Initialize or update a project knowledge base for cross-session knowledge capture

skills.name: register-repo
skills.description: Register your skill repository in the central ecosystem repo-list

skills.name: sync-upstream
skills.description: Check upstream for improvements and incorporate them into your fork

skills.name: write-skill
skills.description: Create or improve Claude Code skills with best practices and validation
